english: to be fun / to make fun
notes: Common phrase used to express that something is enjoyable. 'Spaß machen' can mean either 'to be fun' (es macht Spaß) or 'to joke/kid' (ich mache nur Spaß). Often used impersonally with 'es'.

sentences.german: Das Spielen mit Freunden macht wirklich Spaß.
sentences.english: Playing with friends is really fun.
